title: pupalia prostrata
intro: Pupalia prostrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae, commonly known as the creeping spurge or creeping sandmat. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pupalia prostrata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, can be used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
